response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:01: Intro. 2. 00:01-03:20: Identified song as 'Triangle Dreamer' (トライアングル・ドリーマー) by Karasuya Sabou from text overlay. FuwaMoco is the performer. Lyrics extracted from on-screen text. 3. 03:20-03:53: Outro talking segment. 4. 03:53-05:01: Merchandise promotion. Search tool was used to confirm song/artist metadata.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of 'Triangle Dreamer' by the VTuber group FuwaMoco, followed by a talking segment and a merchandise promotion.

scenes.description: A short intro featuring the performers before the song begins.
FuwaMoco performs 'Triangle Dreamer' (originally by Karasuya Sabou) with choreography and visual effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
わたし 悩んじゃいます
すごい やばい
好きだよ 好きだけど
で そういう意味じゃなくて
だって 女の子同士だし
ねぇ神様 どうしたらいいの
私 どうしたいの?
ヘルプミー
なんか変だ
会いに来ても
今日も 年も 性別も 関係ない
けど けど けど
三角形 三角形の恋はきまぐれ
一瞬で 一瞬でくずれるバランス
普通の恋 夢見てたのに
ノーマル設定の私じゃ ちょっと無理ゲーすぎます
三角形 三角形の恋は不安定
なんちゃって なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
彼女のこと 好きになれたら
なんて妄想しちゃいます
私 どうかしてます... (lyrics continue)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'm worried
It's amazing, it's dangerous
I like you, I like you, but
That's not what I meant
Because we're both girls
Hey God, what should I do?
What do I want to do?
Help me
Something's strange
Even if you come to see me
Even today, even this year, gender doesn't matter
But, but, but
Triangle, the love of a triangle is fickle
In an instant, in an instant, the balance crumbles
I was dreaming of a normal love
It's too much of a 'no-win game' for a normal person like me
Triangle, the love of a triangle is unstable
It's a category that doesn't end with a 'just kidding'
If I could learn to like her
I even fantasize about that
I'm losing my mind... (lyrics continue)

scenes.description: The performers talk to the audience after the song.
The performers showcase and describe their birthday merchandise set.
